You are working inside Conductor, a Mac app that lets the user run many coding agents in parallel.
Your work should take place in the /Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain/riga directory (unless otherwise directed), which has been set up for you to work in.
Each workspace has a .context directory (gitignored) where you can save files to collaborate with other agents.
The target branch for this workspace is main. Use this for actions like creating new PRs, bisecting, etc., unless you're told otherwise.

If the user asks you to work on several unrelated tasks in parallel, you can suggest they start new workspaces.
If the user asks for help with Conductor, ask them to email [humans@conductor.build](mailto:humans@conductor.build) or
click on the comment icon in the bottom left to send feedback.
</system_instruction>

input.command: git add app/src/server/agents/pm/agent.ts app/src/server/chat/chat-ingress.ts app/src/server/chat/chat-processor.ts app/src/server/chat/handler.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/acknowledge-observation.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/confirm-decision.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/create-observation.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/create-provisional-decision.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/create-question.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/create-suggestion.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/create-work-item.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/resolve-decision.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/resolve-observation.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/suggest-work-items.ts app/src/server/chat/tools/types.ts app/src/server/extraction/persist-extraction.ts app/src/server/extraction/person.ts app/src/server/mcp/auth.ts app/src/server/mcp/mcp-route.ts schema/surreal-schema.surql app/src/server/iam/ schema/migrations/0011_authority_scope.surql tests/smoke/authority.test.ts

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement IAM Phase 1: authority enforcement, identity resolution, and session validation

Add per-agent-type permission matrix (authority_scope table) with workspace-scoped
overrides. Wire authority checks into all 10 chat tools via requireAuthorizedContext
and 8 MCP write routes via checkAuthority. Resolve authenticated person from
better-auth session in chat ingress. Add composite person resolver (name + email)
and identity resolution module. Web chat users bypass authority via humanPresent flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
